objective: Build, verify, GitHub-push, and Railway-deploy a polished Tetris web game with full UI/interaction and Agentation integration.
acceptance_checks: Build passes with npm run build
Local app runs and core Tetris loop is playable
UI includes hero/start, board, sidebar, next preview, score, level, controls, pause, game over, restart
Controls include move, rotate, soft drop, hard drop, pause/resume, restart
Agentation is mounted with Consen webhook URL
Git repo initialized with checkpoint commits
GitHub remote exists and code is pushed
Railway deployment succeeds and reachable URL is verified
Playwright screenshots are produced against the running app

tasks.title: Bootstrap project and implement Tetris gameplay foundation
acceptance_checks: Board, tetromino logic, collision, lock, line clear, score, level are implemented

tasks.title: Polish UI states and integrate Agentation
acceptance_checks: Start, playing, paused, and game-over states are visually complete
Agentation is mounted and app remains functional

tasks.title: Verify with build and Playwright screenshots
acceptance_checks: Playwright opens the app and captures UI screenshots

tasks.title: Publish to GitHub and deploy to Railway
acceptance_checks: GitHub repo exists and branch is pushed
Railway deployment succeeds and returns a reachable URL
